\tzpentry{ID3622}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3622 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} R(b) = \arg\max_{a} \left( \mathbf{c}_b \cdot \mathbf{g}_a \right). \end{equation}
